options.a: An IFR aircraft in IMC with comm failure, intending to land at the nearest aerodrome.
options.b: An IFR aircraft in VMC with comm failure, continuing to the destination.
options.c: An IFR aircraft in VMC with comm failure, intending to land at the nearest aerodrome.
options.d: An IFR aircraft in IMC with comm failure, continuing to the destination.
